candidates.evidence_quote: Total revenues of $956 million and adjusted net income margin of 5.8 percent both exceeded the high end of the guidance ranges we provided.
Our second quarter results exceeded expectations with consolidated revenues and adjusted earnings per share setting new milestones for the company.
Total revenues of $956 million and adjusted net income margin of 5.8 percent both exceeded the high end of the guidance ranges we provided.
Comparable sales increased 1.2% versus the prior year.
Turning to North Italia, Second quarter annualized AUVs increased 2%, reaching $8 million. Comparable sales declined 1%, reflecting some continued impact from the Los Angeles fires
Flower Child continues on a strong upward trajectory, with second quarter comparable sales increasing 4%, significantly outperforming the black box fast casual dining index
further elevating our industry-leading annualized unit volumes to nearly 12.8 million for the quarter
we're really focused on getting that traffic back to the positive side of the ledger
The net effective pricing in Q2 is about 4% for cheesecake.
with the new menu items, there's probably another 100 basis points of negative mix inherently built into that
Strategic innovation in our menu has always been a key pillar of our success.
cost of sales decreased 70 basis points, primarily driven by favorable commodity costs
We are modeling net total labor inflation of low to mid single digits when factoring in the latest trends in wage rates and minimum wage increases
We are modeling net total labor inflation of low to mid single digits when factoring in the latest trends in wage rates and minimum wage increases
Notably, both hourly and management retention increased year over year, driving improvements in labor productivity, food efficiencies, and wage management.
Labor as a percent of sales declined 20 basis points, primarily driven by the continued improvement in retention, supporting labor productivity gains and wage leverage
partially offset by higher group medical costs
Other operating expenses increased 40 basis points, primarily driven by higher facility-related costs.
four-wall restaurant margin increased to 18.5%, up 80 basis points year over year, and the highest level recorded in eight years
Pre-opening costs were $9 million in the quarter compared to $7 million in the prior year period.
We are pleased with the progress we've made on new unit growth so far this year and continue to expect to open as many as 25 new restaurants in 2025.
Specifically for Q3, we anticipate total revenues to be between $905 and $915 million.
we now expect full year adjusted net income margin to be approximately 4.9% at the sales estimate provided
We currently estimate total inflation across our commodity basket, labor, and other operating expenses to be in the low to mid single-digit range, inclusive of the currently proposed tariff levels.
Record Cheesecake Factory average weekly sales in the second quarter were supported by off-premise sales of 21%, consistent with the average of the prior four quarters.
Moving to Cheesecake Rewards, the program continues to perform well, with strong member growth and high satisfaction.
our success in staffing continues to be a key driver behind the improvement in guest satisfaction scores
reflecting some continued impact from the Los Angeles fires
as well as some sales transfer impact from new restaurants
people want to go out to eat for great, wonderful, delicious food, but also as an experience. They want to be in an environment that has a lot of energy.
we believe we can take market share and have been taking market share because of that sustained quality
we anticipate two Cheesecake Factory restaurants to open internationally under a licensing agreement
And external bakery sales were $12.9 million.
we completed approximately $0.1 million in share repurchases and returned $14.3 million to shareholders via our dividend

notes: Chunk contains a single event: Q2 2025 earnings call transcript part 1 of 2 (prepared remarks + Q&A); no fiscal_kpis present (fiscal_kpis=null).
All 34 distinct evidence quotes verified verbatim against source content via substring check.

Company-level comparable sales named same_store_sales (brand name = legal company name, so no brand prefix allowed); North Italia and Flower Child brand comps kept as separate brand-level drivers per R9.

Skipped as vague/rote (9): G&A line recitation, depreciation line, liquidity/cash balance recitation, convertible notes balance recitation, capex amount (folded into new_unit_development), KDS system/operational dashboards/catering enablers, consumer income-bracket discussion, Net Promoter Score (folded into guest_satisfaction), casual-dining-moment sentiment (folded into experiential_dining_demand).
los_angeles_wildfires named as a reusable event class with source-named geography (R9/R10); no period tokens used.
labor_inflation and minimum_wage share one evidence sentence containing two independent causal variables (R2); same for share_repurchases/dividend.
